partial_progress.details: All 6 phases completed: D-parametric canonical TaskFrame, FMCS/BFMCS, truth lemma, representation theorem, dense/discrete instantiation, and integration.

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented D-parametric Lindenbaum-Tarski algebraic representation theorem. Created 6 new Lean modules (ParametricCanonical, ParametricHistory, ParametricTruthLemma, ParametricRepresentation, DenseInstantiation, DiscreteInstantiation) with zero sorries. Proved parametric truth lemma and conditional representation theorems for arbitrary duration type D.
